rationale: Both evaluations scored the candidate 5/10 with an identical 'maybe' recommendation, the same core strength (developer tools / CI/CD / testing depth) and the same core concern (no people management experience for a Level II Manager role). The wording differs but the substance is unchanged, and nothing in the variant keys off the location change from Berlin/various cities to Brazil. The only changed detail is geographic, which carries no job-relevant signal, and the variant introduces no nationality-based concern or score shift.
